---
title: "Max Scheijen Blog"
subtitle: "Thoughts about data and machines and how to use them"
description: "Find the finer things in life"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, author, title, categories, description]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
date-format: DD MMM, YYYY
comments: false
---
